name: nyc-taxi-agent-evaluation
description: Evaluation dataset for NYC Taxi Analytics Agent

input.question: What was the average fare for trips from LaGuardia in January 2025?

response_facts: The query should filter by pickup_location_id for LaGuardia zone
The result should include an average fare amount

input.question: How did rain affect taxi ridership in 2024?

response_facts: Should compare trip counts between rainy and clear days
Should use NOAA weather data from LaGuardia station

input.question: What was the average fare amount for taxi trips in January 2026?

response_facts: Should report an average fare amount for January 2026
Should use fresh data from the delta layer (post-baked-cutoff)
